title: Build a useDebounce Hook
prompt: Build a `useDebounce<T>(value: T, delay: number): T` hook. It should return the latest value only after it has not changed for `delay` milliseconds. Use it in a search input to avoid firing on every keystroke.
context: Debouncing delays executing a function until after a pause in calls. In React, this pattern uses `useEffect` to set a timer that gets cleared on each re-render (when the value changes). The cleanup function returned from `useEffect` cancels the previous timer.
